spec.name: read_files_batch
spec.description: Read multiple text files and return their contents as a JSON object mapping file path to content.

paths.description: Array of file paths to read.

return_schema.description: JSON object where keys are the full paths and values are the file contents as strings.

spec.implementation_notes: Use fs.readFileSync for each path, encoding utf8. Handle errors by setting that path's value to null. Return the object.

request.rationale: Need to read all 20 part_*.txt files to assemble the output file, but single file_read per turn will exceed iteration budget. A batch read allows one turn for all reads.
